'''Carnivorous mold''' in the rainforests of [[Nim Drovis]] were producers of acid, capable of eating through flesh on contact. The [[Drovian]]s and [[Gopso'o]] exterminated the mold with [[Flamethrower/Legends|flamethrowers]] and [[acidthrower]]s. A strain of this lethal mold also populated the many hidden caverns and passages within the settlements on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]], specifically [[Plett's Well|Plawal]].

*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
